name: Bundle Validator - Missing Skill Detection
description: Validates that the Bundle Validator correctly detects when a skill in the bundle does not exist in the knowledge graph.

parts.text: Validate this skill bundle: code-review, nonexistent-skill-xyz

Bundle validation complete for [code-review, nonexistent-skill-xyz].

Findings:
- code-review: Found in graph. Valid.
- nonexistent-skill-xyz: NOT FOUND in the knowledge graph. This skill does not exist in the marketplace.

Overall status: INVALID — 1 error (missing skill).
